prestazioni: Engine: Type-935/71 3.2L flat-six (based on the 911 Turbo's M930/70) with a bespoke air-to-water intercooler system, twin KKK K36 turbochargers (1.4 bar boost), and a custom Mahle forged piston kit (9.0:1 compression ratio) for 750+ HP on 100-octane fuel

Drivetrain: Reinforced 935/72 4-speed manual transaxle with a Sachs twin-plate ceramic clutch (240mm diameter) and a 935-specific limited-slip differential (40% lock) from ZF, paired with a custom titanium driveshaft from Pankl Racing Systems

Suspension & Brakes: Full 935/78-spec suspension with Bilstein coilovers (adjustable damping via remote reservoirs), spherical bearing control arms from Meyle, and 917-derived 4-piston aluminum calipers with 380mm ventilated discs (front) and 300mm discs (rear), using Ferodo DS3000 pads
estetica: Body: Factory-correct 935/78 'Moby Dick' widebody kit with hand-laid fiberglass fenders (200mm wider than stock), a custom aluminum rear wing with adjustable Gurney flaps (Weissach-tested for 1,200 lbs of downforce at 200 mph), and a front splitter with integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling

Aerodynamics: Full-length underbody diffuser from 935/78 homologation specs, paired with a custom carbon-fiber rear bumper featuring dual exhaust exits (3.5-inch diameter) for the Akrapovič titanium exhaust system (935-specific 6-into-2-into-1 configuration)

Interior: Full 935/78 race-spec cage (TIG-welded chrome-moly steel) from Matter Motorsport, Recaro SRD full-bucket seats with 6-point Schroth harnesses, and a custom Momo 935 steering wheel (380mm diameter) with a quick-release hub
